PART 3 I SPELLS

data.components: V, S, M (a bit of earth or wood native to the plane targeted and a drop of holy water for a good alignment, or a drop of infernal blood for an evil one)
data.description: You create a circle on the ground that protects up to six allied creatures of your choice within 10 feet of it. While inside the circle, the targets have resistance to necrotic damage and advantage on saving throws against being charmed, frightened, or possessed by an aberration, an undead, or a fiend.

data.components: V, S, M (a piece of silvered glass and a drop of blood from each person who passes through the gate)
data.description: You create a magical portal within range that remains open for 1 hour or until dismissed. Any creature that then enters the portal instantly leaves it and teleports to a destination you choose when you cast this spell (which must be on the same plane of existence). The portal disappears if the caster dismisses it.
